name: Autonomyx Site Scraper + RAG Builder
description: Crawl any URL with Playwright → extract structured data per page via Qwen3-30B → generate embeddings via nomic-embed-text → store in SurrealDB for RAG. Configurable depth: 0=single page, 1=+1 level, -1=entire site. Returns collection name for downstream RAG queries.

node.description: Submits URL to Playwright scraper. Returns job_id immediately.
Polls /status every 5s until job is complete or failed. Max 10 min wait.

template.value:
A website has been scraped and indexed for RAG. Summarise what was done and how to use it.

Scrape result:
{scrape_result}

Return a brief, friendly summary covering:
1. What site was scraped and how many pages
2. The collection name for RAG queries
3. Example query to try: POST /query with {{"collection": "<name>", "query": "<question>"}}
4. How long it took

Be concise. Plain text, no JSON.

model_name.info: 8B is sufficient for summarising scrape results

important_notes: depth=1 → page + all linked pages one level deep
depth=-1 → entire site (use max_pages to limit)
shm_size: 256m MUST be set in docker-compose — Chrome crashes without it
Embeddings use nomic-embed-text via Ollama (768 dimensions)
Structured extraction uses Qwen3-30B-A3B via gateway
Collection name returned for use in RAG queries via /query endpoint
To query after scraping: POST http://playwright-scraper:8400/query with {collection, query, top_k}

api_example.query_after:
curl -X POST http://playwright-scraper:8400/query \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"collection": "site_docs_example_com_abc123", "query": "how to authenticate", "top_k": 5}'
